caption: A person's hands work on a handmade greeting card placed on a light-colored wooden surface. The card features a black border and a white center with the text "SENDING YOU A LITTLE Yuletide Cheer" written in a mix of serif and script fonts. The card is decorated with black foliage silhouettes and a shimmering silver ribbon tied in a bow at the top. In the first frame, the person's left hand holds the side of the card while their right index finger points to the bottom left corner. In the second frame, the right hand moves to point toward the bottom right corner. The third frame shows the person holding a small white circular object, possibly a glue dot or adhesive, near the bottom of the card. In the final frame, the person's right hand moves the white object toward the top right corner of the card.
